messages.text: Error: A listener indicated an asynchronous response by returning true, but the message channel closed before a response was received
messages.note: Chrome extension MV3 noise (origin :0:0 = no script frame); NOT a TuringOS frontend error. Same message appeared 5x; tab-extension messaging artifact.

verdict: Zero page-level JS errors observed across both browser sessions (initial navigate + retry-after-restart). The 9 EXCEPTION lines are Chrome extension messaging artifacts (origin = :0:0, not the spec-grill component); they pre-date W6/W7 and appear on every page load in this MCP-driven Chrome instance.
